appliedRatingCriteria.criterion: Harness artifacts cover setup, scoped work, verification, and handoff; agree with the contract and runbooks; and route to sensors that run as recorded.
Falls short of target with visible gaps or limited evidence, while remaining acceptable.

evidenceTargets.question: Do the checked-in harness artifacts orient an agent and route to sensors that actually run?

inputs.requirementAssessmentBasis: Do the checked-in harness artifacts orient an agent and route to sensors that actually run?
